name: Get catalog item by ID

targetRestContract.notes: MinimalApi endpoint already HTTP-exposed. Returns 404 Not Found when no CatalogItems row exists for the given ID. PictureUri is rewritten to an absolute URL before returning.

notes: No AutoMapper — the CatalogItemDto is manually constructed field-by-field inside HandleAsync (unlike CatalogItemListPagedEndpoint which uses IMapper).
BlazorAdmin CatalogItemService calls GET catalog-items/{id} when loading an item for edit or detail view — no web-side Razor Page calls this endpoint.
